summary: Video. A 2018 DHS 'See Something, Say Something / Protect Your Every Day' public-service announcement. Everyday people, including a firefighter and a teacher in a classroom, deliver spoken testimonial lines to camera asking viewers to report suspicious activity. It ends on a See/Say end card with the DHS seal. The audio is spoken word, not a song. It is a conventional informational PSA from the first Trump term.
notable_text: Protect your every day. Report suspicious activity to local authorities.; If you SEE something SAY something
